description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C++ that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: clang-format and clang-tidy, both running on ubuntu-latest. The clang-format job checks out the repository, installs Clang Format 19, and runs it on specific file types. The clang-tidy job installs Clang Tidy 19 and bear, checks out the repository, sets up Ice build dependencies, builds Ice, and runs Clang Tidy on the src/Ice directory.
